zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Talbot於1388年出生時，她的父親Sir Richard Talbot27歲，母親Ankaret le Strange27歲。她於1410年之前與Sir Thomas de la Barre結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1436年8月14日在威爾士格拉莫爾根巴里享年48歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾可勒格哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Talbot于1388年出生时，她的父亲Sir Richard Talbot27岁，母亲Ankaret le Strange27岁。她于1410年之前与Sir Thomas de la Barre结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1436年8月14日在威尔士格拉莫爾根巴里享年48岁，埋葬在英国賀福爾可勒格哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Talbot was born in 1388, her father, Sir Richard Talbot, was 27 and her mother, Ankaret le Strange, was 27. She married Sir Thomas de la Barre before 1410. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 9 daughters. She died about 14 August 1436, in Barry, Glamorgan, Wales, at the age of 48, and was buried in All Saints' Church, Clehonger, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Talbot est née en 1388, son père, Sir Richard Talbot, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Ankaret le Strange, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas de la Barre avant 1410. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée environ 14 août 1436, à Barry, Glamorgan, Galles, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à All Saints' Church, Clehonger, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Talbot 1388 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Talbot 27 und ihre Mutter Ankaret le Strange 27. Sie hat vor 1410 Sir Thomas de la Barre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb um 14. August 1436 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Barry, Glamorgan, Wales und wurde in All Saints' Church, Clehonger, Herefordshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Talbotが1388年に生まれた時，父Sir Richard Talbotは27歳，母Ankaret le Strangeは27歳であった。1410年以前にSir Thomas de la Barreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1436年8月14日にウェールズグラモーガンバーリーで48歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアクレhオンジャーアル サイントス' チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.All Saints' Church, Clehonger, Herefords: 영국 허퍼드실르 클레호그거 앨 세인츠' 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Alice Talbot(이)가 1388년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Talbot(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ankaret le Strange(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1410년 이전 Sir Thomas de la Barre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1436년 8월 14일 웨일스 글램르건 배리에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 클레호그거 앨 세인츠' 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Talbot nasceu em 1388, seu pai, Sir Richard Talbot, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Ankaret le Strange, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas de la Barre antes 1410. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 14 de agosto de 1436, em Barry, Glamorgan, Gales, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em All Saints' Church, Clehonger, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Talbot родилась в 1388 г., её отцу по имени Sir Richard Talbot было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Ankaret le Strange, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas de la Barre перед 1410 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 9 дочерей. Она умерла около 14 августа 1436 г. в местности барри, глэморган, Уэльс в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности алл сеинц' чурч, клэонгир, хирефордшир, Англия.

Murió aproximadamente 14 de agosto de 1436, en Barry, Glamorgan, Gales, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en All Saints' Church, Clehonger, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
